headline: Business People: General Mills veteran Dana McNabb named COO
summary: FOOD General Mills, Golden Valley, announced that Dana McNabb has been promoted to chief operating officer, effective June 1. McNabb has served as group president of North America retail since 2024 and added North America Pet to her responsibilities in 2025. McNabb started her General Mills career in Canada in 1999. ADVERTISING/PUBLIC RELATIONS MONO, a Minneapolis-based ad agency, announced ...
